children.title: Smart add functionality
children.description: Allow natural language input that gets structured by LLM into proper PRD hierarchy

children.title: Implement LLM-powered add command
children.description: Send description to Claude to determine hierarchy and create full breakdown
acceptanceCriteria: Existing PRD provided as context to avoid duplicates

children.title: Add approval flow for LLM proposals
children.description: Present proposed tree structure for user approval before inserting
acceptanceCriteria: User can approve or reject proposals
Only approved items are added to PRD

children.title: Support scoped additions with parent constraint
children.description: Allow constraining new items under existing parent with --parent flag
acceptanceCriteria: LLM expansion stays within specified parent
Auto-determines placement when no parent specified

children.title: Maintain explicit manual mode
children.description: Support direct task creation bypassing LLM with explicit parameters
acceptanceCriteria: Commands with --title and --parent work as before

children.title: Bulk natural language input
children.description: Support multiple descriptions and file-based input for batch PRD creation

children.title: Support multiple descriptions in single command
children.description: Accept multiple natural language descriptions in one rex add call
acceptanceCriteria: Multiple descriptions can be passed as arguments

children.title: Add piped input support
children.description: Allow piping text into rex add command
acceptanceCriteria: Works with echo and other pipe sources

children.title: Implement file-based idea import
children.description: Support --file flag to read freeform brainstorming notes
acceptanceCriteria: Structures all ideas at once via LLM

children.title: Task selection and state transitions
children.description: Ensure proper task ordering and atomic state management during execution

children.title: Fix findNextTask priority and dependency logic
children.description: Ensure priority ordering and blocked-by dependencies work correctly

children.title: Implement atomic task state transitions
children.description: Transition tasks to in_progress atomically before starting work
acceptanceCriteria: State change happens before work begins
Works for both CLI and API providers

children.title: Add automatic parent completion logic
children.description: Auto-complete parent items when all children are completed
acceptanceCriteria: Features complete when all tasks complete
Epics complete when all features complete

children.title: Handle task failures properly
children.description: Mark failed tasks as deferred with clear error summary
acceptanceCriteria: Tasks not left in in_progress state

children.title: Run quality and guardrails
children.description: Validate work quality and provide safety mechanisms for autonomous execution

children.title: Add completion validation
children.description: Validate meaningful changes were made before marking tasks complete

children.title: Implement review mode
children.description: Add --review flag to show proposed changes before committing

children.title: Add structured run summaries
children.description: Include structured metadata in run records

children.title: Implement token budget limits
children.description: Cap total token spend per run with configurable budget
acceptanceCriteria: Budget separate from max turns limit

children.title: Loop continuity
children.description: Enable continuous autonomous execution with proper error handling

children.title: Add continuous loop mode
children.description: Implement --loop flag to automatically continue to next task
acceptanceCriteria: Automatically picks next task after completion
Continues until no more tasks or manual stop

children.title: Implement stuck task detection
children.description: Skip tasks after multiple failed attempts
acceptanceCriteria: Detects 3+ failed attempts on same task

children.title: Add clear error handling for invalid task selection
children.description: Error clearly when trying to work on completed or deferred tasks

children.title: Flexible hierarchy
children.description: Allow more flexible organization of PRD items beyond rigid four-level structure

children.title: Allow tasks directly under epics
children.description: Support skipping feature level when not needed
acceptanceCriteria: Tasks can have epics as direct parents

children.title: Implement task-to-task dependencies
children.description: Ensure blockedBy field is fully respected in work selection

children.title: Add move command for reparenting
children.description: Support moving items to different parents in the tree
acceptanceCriteria: Can change parent of any item

children.title: Better task lifecycle
children.description: Improve task status management and tracking throughout lifecycle

children.title: Add blocked status
children.description: Distinguish blocked tasks from deferred tasks

children.title: Add explanation to rex next
children.description: Explain why a particular task was selected

children.title: Validate status transitions
children.description: Prevent invalid status changes without explicit force
acceptanceCriteria: Clear error messages for invalid transitions

children.title: Add automatic timestamping
children.description: Track startedAt and completedAt timestamps on status changes
acceptanceCriteria: startedAt set when task becomes in_progress

children.title: PRD quality
children.description: Tools to maintain and clean up PRD structure and content

children.title: Enhance rex validate with structural checks
children.description: Check for orphaned items, circular dependencies, and stuck tasks
acceptanceCriteria: Identifies tasks stuck in_progress too long

children.title: Add rex prune command
children.description: Remove completed subtrees and archive them

children.title: Add rex import alias
children.description: Create synonym for rex analyze --file for discoverability

children.title: Scanner improvements
children.description: Enhance individual scanners to produce better quality analysis results

children.title: Improve scanTests grouping logic
children.description: Group test results by describe-block nesting instead of just file name

children.title: Filter auto-generated files from scanDocs
children.description: Ignore files in dist/, .sourcevision/ and other generated directories

children.title: Enhance scanSourceVision output
children.description: Produce more actionable tasks from zone findings with file paths

children.title: Add scanPackageJson scanner
children.description: Extract scripts, dependencies, and engine requirements as tasks

children.title: Improve scanDocs: numbered lists, clean headings, skip code blocks
Improve scanTests: handle skip/each variants and exclude comment braces
LLM refinement
children.description: Improve the LLM reasoning layer for better analysis quality

children.title: Include project context in LLM prompt
children.description: Add CLAUDE.md or README content to reasonFromScanResults prompt

children.title: Implement duplicate merging
children.description: LLM should merge near-duplicate scan results

children.title: Add model selection for analyze
children.description: Support --model flag to override default model
acceptanceCriteria: Uses specified model for LLM reasoning
Falls back to default if model unavailable

children.title: Handle large result sets with chunking
children.description: Batch large scan results into multiple LLM calls

children.title: Robust LLM response parsing with retry and recovery
Add few-shot examples to LLM prompts
Add semantic quality validation for LLM output
File import enhancements
children.description: Improve file-based import functionality for better flexibility

children.title: Support multiple input files
children.description: Allow multiple --file flags in rex analyze command

children.title: Add JSON and YAML import support
children.description: Support additional file formats beyond markdown

children.title: Show import diff before accepting
children.description: Display changes against existing PRD before importing

children.title: Store adapter architecture
children.description: Create abstraction layer for different storage backends

children.title: Define adapter interface
children.description: Create clean interface that file and external stores implement

children.title: Implement adapter registration system
children.description: Allow registering and configuring different store adapters

children.title: Add bidirectional sync support
children.description: Support changes flowing both ways between local and external stores

children.title: Notion adapter implementation
children.description: Specific implementation for Notion database integration

children.title: Map PRD hierarchy to Notion structure
children.description: Create mapping between PRD items and Notion database structure

children.title: Sync all PRD fields to Notion
children.description: Support status, priority, description, criteria, and tags in Notion

children.title: Use Notion native properties
children.description: Map to Notion's built-in status and priority properties

children.title: Implement conflict resolution
children.description: Handle conflicts when both local and Notion have changes

children.title: Error handling improvements
children.description: Provide clear, actionable error messages instead of technical failures

children.title: Replace stack traces with user-friendly errors
children.description: Show actionable error messages instead of raw stack traces
acceptanceCriteria: No stack traces in normal output

children.title: Add helpful suggestions for missing directories
children.description: Suggest n-dx init when .rex/ doesn't exist

children.title: Handle missing claude CLI gracefully
children.description: Provide install instructions and fallback when claude CLI not found

children.title: Output and formatting
children.description: Improve visual presentation and information density of command output

children.title: Add progress bars to status command
children.description: Show visual progress indicators per epic in status output

children.title: Add tree format option to status
children.description: Support --format=tree to show full hierarchy with status icons

children.title: Stream hench output with section headers
children.description: Provide real-time output from hench with clear organization

children.title: Add quiet mode for scripting
children.description: Support --quiet flag across all commands for automation

children.title: Configuration management
children.description: Unified configuration system across all packages

children.title: Add unified config command
children.description: Single command to view and edit settings across all packages

children.title: Support project-level config file
children.description: Use .n-dx.json at project root for unified configuration

children.title: Document all config options in help
children.description: Include comprehensive config documentation in --help output

children.title: Acceptance criteria as tests
children.description: Link PRD acceptance criteria to actual test execution

children.title: Implement rex verify command
children.description: Add command to run tests associated with acceptance criteria
acceptanceCriteria: Runs relevant tests for a task

children.title: Add automatic test running to hench
children.description: Attempt to run relevant tests when hench completes a task
acceptanceCriteria: Reports test results in run summary

children.title: Show test coverage in status
children.description: Display test coverage per task when acceptance criteria map to tests
acceptanceCriteria: Shows which tasks have test coverage

children.title: CI integration
children.description: Support for continuous integration and automated PRD health checks

children.title: Add n-dx ci command
children.description: Run sourcevision analyze, rex validate, and generate reports

children.title: Output machine-readable reports
children.description: Generate JSON reports of PRD health for CI dashboards

children.title: Fail CI on validation errors
children.description: Return appropriate exit codes for CI failure conditions

children.title: Claude API token tracking
children.description: Track and display token consumption from Claude API calls across all packages

children.title: Add token tracking to sourcevision analyze command
children.description: Track tokens used when sourcevision calls Claude for analysis
acceptanceCriteria: Token usage is captured from Claude API responses
Usage is displayed in analyze output

children.title: Add token tracking to rex analyze command
children.description: Track tokens used when rex calls Claude for PRD generation
acceptanceCriteria: Token usage is captured from Claude API responses
Usage is displayed in analyze output

children.title: Add token tracking to hench runs
children.description: Track tokens used during autonomous agent execution
acceptanceCriteria: Token usage is captured from all Claude API calls in run
Usage is stored in run history

children.title: Usage reporting and visualization
children.description: Provide comprehensive token usage reports across all n-dx operations

children.title: Add token usage to n-dx status command
children.description: Show aggregate token usage across all packages in status output
acceptanceCriteria: Status command shows total tokens used

children.title: Implement dedicated usage reporting command
children.description: Create n-dx usage command for detailed token analytics
acceptanceCriteria: Shows usage by package, command, and time period
Includes cost estimation based on model pricing

children.title: Add usage budget warnings
children.description: Warn users when approaching token usage limits
acceptanceCriteria: Option to abort operations when budget exceeded
